message:
feat(palette): improve navigation, filtering, and visual feedback

Enhance the command palette with visual-order-aware navigation,
selection preservation during filtering, match highlighting, and
adoption of shared state components for consistent UX.

Navigation improvements (model.go):
- Up/Down keys now follow visual order (grouped by category)
- Add cursorVisualPos() to map cursor index to visual position
- Navigation respects category groupings instead of slice order
- Prevents confusing jumps when commands span multiple categories

Filtering improvements (model.go):
- Preserve selection by key when filter results change
- Track prevKey before filtering, restore cursor if key still present
- Users don't lose their place when refining search queries

Visual feedback improvements (model.go):
- Add renderMatchHighlighted() for search term highlighting
- Matched substrings rendered in Mauve+Bold for visual clarity
- Case-insensitive matching with rune-aware boundaries
- Non-selected items show highlighted matches, selected items use gradient

Shared component adoption:
- model.go: Replace inline empty state with components.EmptyState()
- model.go: Replace inline preview empty with components.RenderState()
- selector.go: Replace inline empty state with components.RenderState()

Test coverage added:
- TestNavigationUsesVisualOrderWhenCategoriesInterleave: verifies visual nav
- TestUpdateFilteredPreservesSelectionByKey: verifies selection stability

Design rationale:
- Visual order navigation matches user's mental model of the list
- Selection preservation reduces frustration during search refinement
- Match highlighting accelerates visual scanning of results
- Shared states ensure consistency with dashboard and other TUI surfaces

Part of Premium UX Polish epic (ntm-952) focusing on palette clarity
and predictable interactions (ntm-952.3).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ import (
 	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
 
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tmux"
+	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tui/components"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tui/icons"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tui/styles"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tui/theme"
@@ -218,9 +219,12 @@ func (s SessionSelector) View() string {
 
 	if len(s.sessions) == 0 {
 		// Empty state with styled message
-		emptyIcon := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Warning).Render(ic.Warning)
-		emptyText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Overlay).Italic(true).Render("No tmux sessions found")
-		b.WriteString("  " + emptyIcon + " " + emptyText + "\n\n")
+		b.WriteString(components.RenderState(components.StateOptions{
+			Kind:    components.StateEmpty,
+			Icon:    ic.Warning,
+			Message: "No tmux sessions found",
+			Width:   boxWidth,
+		}) + "\n\n")
 
 		hintStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Subtext)
 		cmdStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Blue).Bold(true)
